title: packera neomexicana var. toumeyi
intro: Packera neomexicana var. toumeyi, also known as Toumey's ragwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Packera neomexicana var. toumeyi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
